data.current_description: Create an association session for initiating an association with an AdSense user.
data.description_suggestion: Initiates a new association session to begin the process of associating a publisher with an AdSense account. This operation generates a unique session identifier and returns session details including the callback URL for the AdSense signup flow. The session remains active until verified or expires. Requires authentication as an AdSense Host. Returns an AssociationSession object containing the session ID and redirect URL for the publisher to complete signup.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description lacks clarity on inputs (5 parameters not explained), outputs (what AssociationSession contains), and side effects (session creation and lifecycle). Added details about session creation, callback mechanism, authentication requirements, and return value structure to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Verify an association session after the association callback returns from AdSense signup.
data.description_suggestion: Verifies an association session after a publisher completes the AdSense signup flow and the callback is received. This operation confirms the association between the publisher and AdSense account, completing the onboarding process. Requires the session ID as input. Returns the verified AssociationSession object with updated status. Side effects include finalizing the publisher association and enabling AdSense services for the associated account.
